'''Renzii''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]] who worked at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
